data.title: CVS Health to discuss Q4 & full year 2025 earnings on Feb. 11 at 8:00 a.m. ET with analysts and investors.
data.description: CVS Health (NYSE: CVS) has scheduled a conference call on February 11th, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2025. The discussion with analysts and investors will be available via an audio webcast.

data.title: Citadel Completions rebrands as Citadel Aviation, expanding global services. LA, Jan 9, 2026 - reflects transition from VIP compl. to aviation services.
data.description: In Lake Charles, Louisiana on January 9, 2026, it was announced that Citadel Completions has officially rebranded as Citadel Aviation. This change signifies the company's shift from a VIP completions specialist to a full-service global aviation provider. The transformation showcases Citadel Aviation's commitment to offering a wide range of aviation services.

data.title: Applied Digital Corp (NASDAQ: APLD) reports strong Q2 results, in talks with new tenant. Analyst sets $41 PT.
data.description: Applied Digital Corp (NASDAQ: APLD) exceeded expectations in the second quarter of fiscal 2026 and is in advanced discussions with a potential new hyperscaler tenant, as per information from Needham. Analyst John Todaro from Applied Digital reiterated a Buy rating and set a price target of $41. The company's quarterly revenues and adjusted EBITDA align with Needham's projections, highlighting the positive outlook for Applied Digital. Further details on this development can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Southwest stock gets double upgrade; Delta earnings upcoming. Airline poised for breakout.
data.description: A major boost for Southwest Airlines as its stock receives a double upgrade, showcasing strong potential for growth. With an attractive setup in place, the airline is poised for success ahead of the upcoming earnings season. Meanwhile, Delta Airlines is gearing up to report its earnings, adding to the anticipation within the airline industry. This positive development hints at a potential breakout for the airline sector, as highlighted by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Unemployment rate decreases despite slow hiring. Trump tariff ruling may impact markets. - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The market may experience fluctuations due to a potential tariff decision by Trump. Despite modest hiring levels, the latest jobs report indicates a decrease in the unemployment rate. More information is available on Investor's Business Daily's live coverage.

data.title: Michael Baker International integrates Infinity into its business, strengthening MEP, structural, and fire protection engineering sectors.
data.description: Engineering firm Michael Baker International has recently enhanced its competitive standing in Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing (MEP), Structural, and Fire Protection Engineering. The company, based in Pittsburgh, made this announcement on January 9, 2026. Michael Baker International is a key player in providing technology-driven engineering and consulting services worldwide.

data.title: SuperCom secures second new electronic monitoring contract in Texas, solidifying rapid expansion in the state.
data.description: SuperCom, a leading global provider of secure solutions for e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity, has been chosen by a juvenile probation agency to replace their current technology provider. This decision highlights the company's rapid expansion as stated on Jan. 9, 2026. SuperCom, listed on the NASDAQ under SPCB, is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel.

data.title: Canadian Banc Corp. has successfully completed an overnight offering of Preferred Shares (TSX: BK.PR.A) with gross proceeds of $103.2 million.
data.description: In Toronto on January 9, 2026, Canadian Banc Corp. successfully concluded the marketing of Preferred Shares (TSX: BK.PR.A). The offering is anticipated to generate roughly $103.2 million in total gross proceeds.
Olina tanker seized by the US, departed Venezuela - Venezuela

data.title: Algolia to address AI-driven retail at NRF 2026 with over 18,000 businesses & experts, including Frasers Group & Microsoft.
data.description: In San Francisco, Algolia, a leading AI Search and Retrieval platform utilized by over 18,000 businesses and countless developers globally, shared news about Bernadette Nixon, a member of their board. She is set to present at NRF 2026 in New York from January 11-13. Joining her are retail technology specialists: David Clark, the Chief Customer Officer at Frasers Group, and Jennifer Myers, the Head of Strategic Partnerships at Microsoft Shopping. Together, they will lead a panel discussion titled “Beyond the website: Reinventing retail”, focusing on the future of the retail sector.

data.title: Fiserv introduces Unknown Shopper at NRF for enhanced in-store customer understanding from card-present transactions.
data.description: Fiserv, a prominent provider of payment and financial services technology, has introduced a new analytics tool called Unknown Shopper. This innovative capability aims to assist merchants and marketing partners in comprehending in-store customer behavior and creating actionable customer segments from card-present transactions. Known for enhancing payment activity understanding, Unknown Shopper by Fiserv offers merchants the ability to derive insights from in-store transactions. This solution is set to boost customer engagement by leveraging data collected from card-present transactions.

data.title: Grindr appoints Tristan Pineiro as Chief Marketing Officer and Zac Katz as Chief Legal Officer & Head of Global Affairs.CEO George Arison praises their work.
data.description: Grindr Inc. based in West Hollywood, California recently appointed Tristan Pineiro as the Chief Marketing Officer and Zac Katz as the Chief Legal Officer, General Counsel, and Head of Global Affairs. The CEO of Grindr, George Arison, stated that these appointments signify the significant roles that Zac and Tristan play within the company. The appointments are effective immediately, showcasing their leadership qualities and contributions to the company's daily operations.

data.title: Litgrid AB to release 2026 results and hold General Meeting of Shareholders.
data.description: Litgrid AB is set to publish its financial results for the year 2026 and hold an Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders accordingly.

data.title: ENvue Medical launches program using NanoVibronix tech to reduce discomfort with indwelling nasogastric tubes.
data.description: The upcoming program is set to incorporate the Company's scientifically proven NanoVibronix technology to enhance the comfort level for individuals with indwelling nasogastric tubes. This initiative aims to improve the overall experience for patients while using these tubes.

data.title: NYC Plastic Surgeon Dr. Aviva Preminger enters Super Doctors Hall of Fame after 10 years of being recognized, featured in NY Times.
data.description: Dr. B. Aviva Preminger, a board-certified plastic surgeon, has recently been honored by being inducted into the Super Doctors Hall of Fame. This recognition comes after being named a New York Super Doctor for ten consecutive years. The news was featured in The New York Times Magazine. Dr. Preminger is highly respected in the field and has earned a reputation as a leading expert in complex breast procedures.

data.title: Prescryptive and Ilant Health partner to offer transparent GLP-1 pricing to employers, enhancing obesity care access.
data.description: In Redmond, Washington, on January 9, 2026, Prescryptive and Ilant Health revealed a new partnership to provide employers with access to clear GLP-1 pricing combined with specialized clinical care focused on achieving desired results. This collaboration utilizes Prescryptive's direct-to-market platform and is designed to offer companies a more transparent and effective healthcare solution.

data.title: Pacsun launches PS Community Hub, merging culture & commerce in app. CEO discusses Gen Alpha & Gen Z research at NRF conference in NYC. Los Angeles, Jan. 9, 2026.
data.description: During the National Retail Foundation conference in New York City, CEO Brieane Olson of Pacsun shared insights on Gen Alpha and presented a detailed analysis of Gen Z research. The event took place on January 9, 2026. Olson highlighted Pacsun's new direction to revolutionize the retail sector by fostering a creator-led community interaction. This strategic approach aims to target the upcoming generations, with particular focus on engaging with Gen Z consumers. Based in Los Angeles, Pacsun is allocating resources towards reshaping retail experiences and strengthening its presence in the market.

data.title: GreenPower awarded $5M LEDA, $9.6M tax credits & incentives for NM facility citing EV ecosystem, trade zone & incentives.
data.description: GreenPower Motor Company Inc., a prominent manufacturer and distributor trading on the NASDAQ under the symbol GP, has announced the establishment of a new facility in Santa Teresa, New Mexico. The company pointed to several factors influencing their decision, including the supportive electric vehicle ecosystem in the region, access to a foreign trade zone, and attractive financial incentives. This move signifies a significant investment in the local economy and will contribute to job creation in the area. The facility is expected to offer employment opportunities to a large number of individuals in Santa Teresa and surrounding areas.
